headline: Trump 🍊👑 CEASEFIRE HACK 🕐🚫 Congress Iran War Approval 😎💥
text:
President Trump 🍊🦅 dropping BOMBSHELL 📜💣 on Congress simps 🤡📜: 'Hostilities TERMINATED 💀⚰️ cuz CEASEFIRE 🛑🔥 paused the CLOCK 🕐⏸️!' No need for your WEAK ASS authorization 🖕📋 under War Powers Act – Trumpie said 'PEACE BITCHES ✌️😤' after Iran chill pill since April 7, 2026! Clock started Feb 28 strikes 💥🇮🇷 but now it's SNOOZED 😴🛌 like Biden's brain cells 🧟‍♂️💤!

Iran mullahs 🕌😩 sending PROPOSAL 📨🇵🇰 via Pakistan wingmen 🕺💌 – Tehran tea ☕ spilling deets but US like 'IDK 🤷‍♂️, let's see!' Trump to reporters: 'Just CHATTED 💬 with Iran ayatollahs, not HAPPY 😠 cuz they're CONFUSED AF 🌀🤯 after we YEETED their top generals 🎯💀!' CENTCOM briefing? Options from 'BLAST HELL 🔥🍆 out of 'em FOREVER 😈💥' to 'MAKE DEAL 🤝💰' – Trump picking DOOR #2 but 'NO CRAPPY DEAL 🚫🤮, we FIX it PROPERLY 🛠️👷‍♂️ or PROBLEM BACK in 3 YRS 🔄😩!'

Treasury DADDY 💰🛡️ WARNING: Pay Iran TOLL 🚢💸 for Strait of Hormuz? SANCTIONS SLAP 🔴🚫 – channel STILL CLOGGED 🚧🌊 fucking global trade BRRR 😤📉! Congress cucks 🐔🏛️ sweating VOTES 🗳️😰 on war auth – 1973 Nixon Vietnam LESSON 📚🛡️ says END IT in 60 DAYS or GTFO 🏃‍♂️💨 unless DECLARATION 🥁 or 30-day EXTEND 🍆⏳!

DefSec Pete Hegseth 🪖🔥 telling hearings: 'CLOCK PAUSED 🕐⏸️ bby!' Dem clown Tim Kaine 😂🗳️: 'STATUTE SAYS NOPE 🚫📜!' Dems TRYING to LEASH Trump 🐶⛓️ on Iran but GOP Bros 🐻💪 BLOCKING – some RINOs sniffing RECONSIDER after D60 😏🔄. Trump ZINGS: 'NO OTHER COUNTRY does this CONGRESS BS 🤡🌍 – TOTALLY UNCONSTITUTIONAL 🖕🇺🇸!'

Expert prof Heather Brandon-Smith 🧠📚 from Georgetown SLAYING: 'Ceasefire AIN'T PERMANENT END 🛑❌ – clock STILL TICKING 🕐💥!' Courts or Congress gotta STOP the WAR 🎭⚖️ if Trump keeps BALLS DEEP 🍑🔥. Flashback: US-Israel TAG TEAM 💥🇮🇱 smoked Iran SUPREME LEADER 👑💀, mullahs COUNTER with Gulf GOONS 🚀🇮🇷 – all cuz NUCLEAR BOMB DRAMA ☢️🧨 (Tehran denies like 'FAKE NEWS 🤥📱')!

Trump ADMIN LAWYERING HARD ⚖️😎 vs War Powers – Dems seething, GOP cheering, world holding breath 🌍😮💨. Is it CEASEFIRE WIN 🏆✌️ or TRUMP TROLL 🧌😂? Iran confused, Congress cucked, Strait clogged – STAY TUNED 📺🍿 for next EPISODE! 🚀🇺🇸
